name: Buf CLI
desc: The modern standard for Protobuf management. Includes a linter, formatter, breaking change detector, editor LSP support, and a high-performance code generator.

name: protolint
desc: A highly configurable linter for Protocol Buffer files to ensure style consistency and best practices.

name: Google API Linter
desc: Check your API design against Google's API Improvement Proposals (AIPs) to ensure industry-standard naming and patterns.

name: protovalidate
desc: Runtime validation for Protobuf messages using rules defined directly in your .proto files.

name: Plumber
desc: CLI tool for inspecting and routing messages in Kafka, RabbitMQ, and SQS with native on-the-fly Protobuf decoding.

name: protoc-gen-doc
desc: Generates beautiful documentation (HTML, Markdown, PDF) from your .proto files.

name: protoc-gen-connect-openapi
desc: Generates high-quality OpenAPI 3.x definitions from your Protobuf services, with excellent support for ConnectRPC and gRPC-Gateway.

name: protoc-gen-jsonschema
desc: Generates JSON Schema definitions from your Protobuf messages, so you can use them with JSON-based validation tools.

name: protoc-gen-grpc-gateway
desc: Automatically generates a reverse proxy server that translates RESTful JSON APIs into gRPC, allowing you to support both protocols easily.

name: gRPC
desc: The industry standard for high-performance RPC. Originally developed by Google, it uses HTTP/2 and supports advanced features like bidirectional streaming and server reflection.

name: ConnectRPC
desc: A simple, modern, multi-protocol alternative to gRPC for Go, TypeScript, Kotlin, Swift, and Python. Supports gRPC, gRPC-Web, and Connect HTTP protocols natively.

name: Twirp
desc: A simple and minimalist RPC framework by Twitch. It focuses on reliability and simplicity, using Protobuf over HTTP/1.1 without the complexity of gRPC.

name: dRPC
desc: A lightweight Go replacement for gRPC by Storj. Designed to be leaner and faster, it reduces memory overhead while remaining compatible with existing Protobuf definitions.

name: Apache brpc
desc: An industrial-grade C++ RPC framework by Baidu. It is heavily optimized for extreme concurrency and low latency, often used in massive service deployments.

name: Apache Dubbo
desc: A popular microservices framework from Alibaba. Its 'Triple' protocol natively adopts HTTP/2 and Protobuf for modern, gRPC-compatible serialization.

name: protobuf-c (C)
desc: C: https://github.com/protobuf-c/protobuf-c

desc: C: https://github.com/haberman/upb/wiki

name: exprotoc (Elixir)

name: Wire
desc: A clean, lightweight implementation built by Square, generating idiomatic JVM/Android models and service interfaces.

desc: Protobuf for nginx module

desc: Gradle Protobuf Plugin

desc: Multi-platform executable JAR and Java API for protoc

name: py-pb-converters
desc: Python scripts to convert between Protocol Buffers and JSON

name: pbjson
desc: C++ library for serialization/de-serialization between Protocol Buffers and JSON.

name: protoc-gen-doc
desc: Documentation generator plugin (Markdown/HTML/DocBook/...)

name: protobuf-el
desc: ProtoBuf with Java EE7 Expression Language 3.0; pure Java ProtoBuf Parser and Builder.

name: protoc-gen-lint
desc: Linter for .proto files

name: protobuf-es
desc: The official ECMAScript runtime and code generator (protoc-gen-es) for Protocol Buffers from Buf.

name: protoplugin
desc: A Go library designed to simplify the creation of protoc plugins by providing hardening and a cleaner interface.

name: connect-query-es
desc: TypeScript-first expansion pack for TanStack Query (React Query) within the ConnectRPC ecosystem.

name: protobuf-ts
desc: A highly popular community plugin (protoc-gen-ts) to generate TypeScript interfaces, RPC clients, and validation from .proto files.

name: protoc-gen-graphql
desc: A protoc plugin to automatically generate GraphQL schemas and resolver types from Protobuf definitions.

name: betterproto
desc: A clean, modern Python generator and library for Protobuf and gRPC, providing dataclass-based messages.

name: gRPC-Web
desc: A JavaScript client library and protoc plugin (protoc-gen-grpc-web) for enabling gRPC in web browsers.

name: gRPC Node
desc: gRPC implementation for Node.js, including native code generation plugins.

name: protobuf-net
desc: High-performance contract-based serialization library for .NET that implements the Protocol Buffers wire format.

name: Kratos
desc: A Go microservices framework for the cloud-native era, using Protobuf and gRPC as its foundation.

name: grpcurl
desc: Like cURL, but for gRPC: Command-line tool for interacting with gRPC servers.

name: Kitex
desc: High-performance Go RPC framework for building microservices, natively supporting Protobuf.

name: kotlinx.serialization
desc: Kotlin multiplatform / multi-format serialization library supporting JSON, CBOR, and Protocol Buffers.

name: Typia
desc: Super-fast runtime validators and serialization library for TypeScript using transformers, supporting Protobuf.

name: TypeSpec
desc: A highly extensible API design language from Microsoft that compiles to OpenAPI, JSON Schema, and Protobuf.

name: Proto Actor (Go)
desc: Ultra fast distributed actors for Go, C#, Java and Kotlin using Protobuf for network communication.

name: Prototool
desc: Your Swiss Army Knife for Protocol Buffers - compile, lint, and format protos easily.

name: Prost
desc: A fast, memory-efficient Protocol Buffers implementation for the Rust programming language.

name: Cellnet
desc: A high performance, simple, and extensible network server library for Go supporting TCP, WebSocket, and Protobuf.

name: Protocol Buffers (Google)
desc: Google's language-neutral, platform-neutral, extensible mechanism for serializing structured data. Contains the protoc compiler, code generator stubs, and official runtimes.

name: grpcreflect-go
desc: Adds support for the gRPC Server Reflection API to any Go net/http server, including those built with Connect.

name: grpchealth-go
desc: Provides gRPC-style health checks for any Go net/http server, including those built with Connect.

name: otelconnect-go
desc: Provides OpenTelemetry metrics and tracing instrumentation for Connect Go clients and servers.

name: examples-es
desc: TypeScript and JavaScript examples demonstrating ConnectRPC integrations with web frameworks and tools.

name: connect-conformance
desc: Official test suite validating interoperability, compatibility, and protocol conformance across Connect, gRPC, and gRPC-Web.

name: vanguard-go
desc: A library for net/http Go servers enabling transcoding between gRPC, gRPC-Web, Connect, and REST.

name: Insomnia
desc: A collaborative API client that supports debugging, testing, and mocking gRPC and Protobuf APIs.

name: Postman
desc: A popular API platform that includes support for creating, testing, and debugging gRPC requests and mocking Protobuf endpoints.

name: k6
desc: An open-source, developer-centric performance testing tool by Grafana that supports load testing gRPC services using custom JavaScript scenarios.

name: protokt
desc: A popular Kotlin-specific compiler plugin and runtime generator for Protocol Buffers, producing idiomatic Kotlin code.

name: Wireshark
desc: A network packet sniffer with built-in Protocol Buffers and gRPC dissectors, enabling you to decode and inspect raw binary protobuf messages over the wire.

name: Protolock
desc: A track-and-lock utility designed to prevent backward-incompatible changes to Protobuf schema files, saving downstream clients from breakage.

name: FauxRPC
desc: A tool to generate fake service implementations directly from Protobuf schemas, supporting gRPC, ConnectRPC, gRPC-Web, and REST on-the-fly.

name: google.golang.org/protobuf
desc: The official and current standard Go implementation for Protocol Buffers.

name: molecule
desc: A specialized Go library for parsing protobufs with zero memory allocation, useful for high-throughput edge systems.

name: Envoy
desc: A high-performance edge and service proxy with native, deep support for routing, translating, and observing gRPC/Protobuf traffic.

name: gRPCui
desc: An interactive web UI for gRPC, allowing you to explore and test gRPC services directly from your browser.

name: Kreya
desc: A popular graphical desktop client for gRPC and REST APIs, with support for server reflection and environments.

name: Evans
desc: A highly interactive, REPL-style command-line client for gRPC that makes exploring services via terminal intuitive.

name: Tonic
desc: A native gRPC client and server implementation for Rust, built on top of Hyper, Tokio, and Prost.

name: ts-proto
desc: A popular Protobuf compiler plugin for TypeScript that generates plain-object interfaces and simple helper classes.

name: SwiftProtobuf
desc: Apple's official plugin and runtime library for using Protocol Buffers within Swift projects.

name: gRPC Swift
desc: The official Swift gRPC library, providing client and server capabilities built on SwiftNIO.

name: ScalaPB
desc: The definitive Protocol Buffer compiler plugin for Scala, generating idiomatic case classes and native gRPC bindings.

name: Armeria
desc: An asynchronous HTTP/2 microservices framework for the JVM supporting gRPC, REST, and GraphQL simultaneously.

name: Confluent Schema Registry
desc: A shared registry for schema management that provides serialization/deserialization helpers and compatibility verification for Kafka.

name: pbtk
desc: A reverse-engineering toolkit for Protocol Buffers, helping you extract schemas from binaries and analyze payloads.

name: blackboxprotobuf
desc: A security and analysis utility that allows decoding and editing of Protobuf messages without having the original schemas.

name: buffrs
desc: A modern package manager for Protocol Buffers, providing dependency management and registry publication capabilities.

name: EmbeddedProto
desc: A lightweight C++ Protobuf generator optimized for microcontrollers and embedded systems, featuring zero dynamic allocations.

name: grpcbin
desc: A mock gRPC service (similar to httpbin) that is extremely useful for testing and debugging gRPC clients.

name: elixir-protobuf
desc: A pure Elixir compiler and runtime library implementation for Protocol Buffers.

name: protox
desc: A reasonably fast, easy to use and 100% conformant Elixir library for Google Protocol Buffers (aka protobuf).

name: grpclib
desc: A pure-Python asyncio-based implementation of a gRPC client and server, with zero external C dependencies.

name: protobuf-decoder
desc: A lightweight, browser-based tool to decode and inspect raw binary Protocol Buffers logs and payloads on-the-fly.

name: protocurl
desc: A command-line tool (similar to cURL) to make requests to HTTP endpoints that accept or return Protocol Buffers.

name: protobuf-javascript
desc: The official JavaScript Protocol Buffers code generator plugin (protoc-gen-js).

name: protobuf-dart

name: grpc-java
